final:
// // This module implements a 4-bit right shifter circuit with a reset functionality. When the reset signal is activated, the output is set to zero. Otherwise, the circuit shifts the 4-bit input value right by 2 bits, effectively discarding the two most significant bits and filling the most significant bits with zeros.
module top_module(
    input [3:0] in,
    input reset,
    output reg [3:0] out
);always @(*) begin
    if (reset) begin
        out <= 4'b0000; //reset output to 0
    end
    else begin
        out <= {in[1:0], 2'b00}; //shift left by 2 bits and set 2 LSBs to 0
    end
end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module implements a 4-bit right shifter circuit with a reset functionality. When the reset signal is activated, the output is set to zero. Otherwise, the circuit shifts the 4-bit input value right by 2 bits, effectively discarding the two most significant bits and filling the most significant bits with zeros.
